Description:
Model
Brand: ADATA
Series: LEGEND 710
Model: ALEG-710-2TCS
Device Type: Internal Solid State Drive (SSD)
Used For: Consumer


Details
Form Factor: M.2 2280
Capacity: 2TB
Memory Components: 3D NAND
Interface: PCI-Express 3.0 x4
Protocol: NVMe 1.4
Controller: Realtek RTS5766DL
Cache: No DRAM (HMB)


Performance
Max Sequential Read: Up to 2400 MBps
Max Sequential Write: Up to 1800 MBps
4KB Random Read: Up to 200,000 IOPS
4KB Random Write: Up to 150,000 IOPS
Terabytes Written (TBW): 520TB
MTBF: 1,500,000 hours
HeatSink: with HeatSink


Features
Features: * Ultra-fast PCIe Gen3 x4 interface
* R/W speed up to 2,400/1,800MB/s
* NVMe 1.4 support
* Heat sink reduces temp. by up to 15%
* Supports Host Memory Buffer(HMB)
* Advanced hardware LDPC ECC Technology
* AES 256-bit encryption support
* Great upgrade option for creators
* For aspiring or amateur content creators looking to edit photos/videos, illustrate, and other tasks.
* Free software: SSD Toolbox and Migration Utility


Environmental
Operating Temperature: 0°C ~ +70°C
Storage Temperature: -40°C ~ +85°C
Max Shock Resistance: 1500G


Dimensions & Weight
Height: 3.13mm
Width: 80mm
Depth: 22mm
Label: SSD M.2 ADATA Legend 710 2TB
